caption: A man with a beard, wearing a dark blazer over a light-colored shirt and a lanyard, stands on a stage giving a presentation at EuroPython. He is positioned to the left of a large projection screen that displays a dark background with a geometric network pattern and the heading "THE DATASET". Below the heading, the screen reads, "All historical data from top 100 cryptos / Data goes from beginning to 09/2017 / 563871 daily-price (close) points". At the bottom of the frame, a white banner features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture and gestures with his left hand toward the screen to emphasize his points. The presentation slide remains static across all frames while the man continues to speak and move slightly.
